skills.name: camera_align_view_to_object
skills.description: Align Scene View camera to look at an object.

skills.name: camera_get_info
skills.description: Get Scene View camera position and rotation.

skills.name: camera_list
skills.description: List all cameras in the scene

skills.name: camera_look_at
skills.description: Focus Scene View camera on a world-space point (x/y/z only, not object name).

skills.name: camera_sceneview_screenshot
skills.description: Capture the editor SCENE VIEW (the developer's editing viewport — can overlook the whole scene incl. off-camera objects; distinct from scene_screenshot which is the Game View/player camera, and camera_screenshot which is one Game Camera). By default captures the full Scene View incl. grid/gizmos/selection (on-screen read); auto-falls back to a clean offscreen render if the editor build doesn't support it. filename is a bare filename only (no path separators); saved under Assets/Screenshots/.

skills.name: camera_screenshot
skills.description: Capture a screenshot from a Game Camera to file

skills.name: camera_set_culling_mask
skills.description: Set Game Camera culling mask by layer names (comma-separated)

skills.name: camera_set_orthographic
skills.description: Switch Game Camera between orthographic and perspective mode

skills.name: camera_set_properties
skills.description: Set Game Camera properties (FOV, clip planes, clear flags, background color, depth)

skills.name: camera_set_transform
skills.description: Set Scene View camera position/rotation manually.
